Talk to Neow to see blessing options

NEOW CHOICE: Options are (0) upgrade a card, (1) enemies in next 3 combats have 1 HP, (2) curse+transform 2, (3) trade Burning Blood for random boss relic. Taking (1): three free combats = zero HP loss, 3 card rewards, and gold — the strongest Act 1 tempo, and it preserves Burning Blood (our healing engine at A9). Option 3 risks Sozu/Cursed Key while losing our only healing. WIN%: 22% (baseline A9 Ironclad). WHY: starting estimate.

FIGHT STRATEGY - Gremlin Nob (BURNING ELITE: Regenerate 3 confirms it - Emerald Key fight). TYPE: hard-scaler - kill speed over full block. WIN CONDITION: race him: ~95 effective HP (86 + regen) in ~5 turns. He gains Str per SKILL I play after his T1 Bellow, so ATTACKS ONLY from T2: Bash/Thunderclap keep Vuln up, Clothesline applies Weak (16->12), Fiend Fire is the burst finisher (~7/card exhausted, attacks don't trigger Enrage). Buffer eats his first Rush free. RISKS: 44 HP start; if the race goes past T6 I die. WIN%: 21% (-3). WHY: forced burning elite at 55% HP with no potions - but Buffer+Weak+Vuln make the race winnable, and the key/relic payoff is real.

The Guardian

events.text: RECALL -- The Guardian, layer:heuristics, bosses/The Guardian

events.reasoning: FIGHT STRATEGY - The Guardian (250 HP, Mode Shift 35). TYPE: Boss - HP spend OK. WIN CONDITION: attrition with Vuln uptime; use Mode Shift triggers to cancel his big attacks. PLAN: T1 free (Charging Up): Shockwave = Weak 3 + Vuln 3, + Strike (counter 35->26). T2: deal 26+ to trigger Mode Shift DURING Fierce Bash turn - cancels the 32 AND preserves my Buffer. Defensive mode: respect Sharp Hide (no attack spam), block Roll 9/Twin Slam 16. Repeat cycles; Impervious saved for an uncancellable 32 or Whirlwind. Do NOT over-exhaust: FF only with junk hands. POTIONS: none held (Fruit Juice is +5 max HP - drink before fight ends). WIN%: 30% (+5). WHY: solid relic base, Weak/Vuln package, Pantograph topped me to 63.

events.text: RECALL -- The Champ, layer:heuristics, bosses/The Champ

events.reasoning: FIGHT STRATEGY - The Champ (440 HP). Phase 1 >220: pure damage, SAVE Disarm + a Shockwave for after Anger (debuffs wiped at transition, he gains ~+9 Str). Phase 2: re-debuff immediately (Disarm -2 Str, Shockwave Weak/Vuln), burst with Immolate+/FF, Bites sustain. Buffer eats one full hit per fight - don't waste block when Buffer covers. T1: Immolate+ 28 + 2 Bites = 42 dmg, Buffer eats Heavy Slash. WIN%: 42% (+2). WHY: full HP via Pantograph, deck thinned, debuff plan matches the boss script.
